cards.prompt: Func<int,int,int> add и Action<string> log: печать add(2,3) и log("hi") — обе строки?
cards.code: using System; Func<int,int,int> add = (a,b) => a + b; Action<string> log = s => Console.WriteLine("log: " + s); Console.WriteLine(add(2,3)); log("hi");

cards.prompt: Predicate<int> isEven на List 1..6: FindAll и Find — обе строки?
cards.code: using System; using System.Collections.Generic; var nums = new List<int>{1,2,3,4,5,6}; Predicate<int> isEven = n => n % 2 == 0; Console.WriteLine(string.Join(",", nums.FindAll(isEven))); Console.WriteLine(nums.Find(isEven));

cards.prompt: Func<int,int,int,int> f: f(2,3,4) и число тип-аргументов через GetGenericArguments — обе строки?
cards.code: using System; Func<int,int,int,int> f = (a,b,c) => a*b*c; Console.WriteLine(f(2,3,4)); Console.WriteLine(f.GetType().GetGenericArguments().Length);
